backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the LOBODA Jewelry backend with product/category CRUD, pagination, transaction tracking, admin management, and HTTP outcall support via the IC management canister. Includes blob storage mixin and authorization helpers.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two logo-related features (replacing the main logo asset and adding a compact icon variant) to their affected frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the LOBODA Jewelry app, loading Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond and Montserrat), setting the favicon to the logo PNG, and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.css: Empty CSS file with no styles defined.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, category, about, contact, admin, dashboard, payment success), wrapping them in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, CartProvider, and a shared Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About page component featuring a charcoal hero section, a two-column brand story with an image, and a four-value grid (Quality, Compliance, Passion, Trust) styled with the luxury serif/gold theme.
frontend/src/components/Admin.tsx: Full admin dashboard component with tabbed UI for managing products, categories, transactions, admins, and settings, including bulk edit/delete, CRUD modals, pagination, and Stripe/allowed-origins configuration.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component with tabs for managing products and categories, including dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting products, and adding categories. Uses React Query hooks and requires admin authentication via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Cart.tsx: Slide-in cart sidebar component that displays cart items with quantity controls and handles Stripe checkout session creation, redirecting users to Stripe on success.
frontend/src/components/ContactUs.tsx: Contact page component displaying business contact info (email, phone, location, hours) alongside a contact form that simulates submission with a toast notification.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component rendering brand logo, social media links, and categorized navigation link columns (Engagement, Jewelry, Gemstones, Company) with routing via TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with desktop dropdown navigation and mobile menu, Internet Identity login/logout, admin link visibility, and cart/search icon buttons.
frontend/src/components/Marketplace.tsx: Displays a jewelry marketplace with category browsing, product grids, trust badges, and a 'coming soon' email signup state when no products exist for a category.
frontend/src/components/Pagination.tsx: Reusable pagination component that renders previous/next buttons and numbered page buttons with item range display.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSuccess.t: Handles the post-checkout payment success page by polling transaction status and rendering processing, success, or error states accordingly.
frontend/src/components/Router.tsx: Lightweight custom client-side router providing RouterProvider context, Route matching, and Link components using the History API.
frontend/src/components/TransactionDetai: Modal that fetches and displays Stripe checkout session line items and shipping details, with automatic pagination support.
frontend/src/components/UserAccount.tsx: User account page showing Internet Identity login/logout, editable display name, and a list of past transactions with status icons.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Defines a React context and reducer for shopping cart state, providing actions to add, remove, update, and clear items, plus cart open/close toggling and total price/item count helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend data operations including fetching, adding, editing, and deleting products and categories, as well as order and user management mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that configures Tailwind CSS, defines a luxury jewelry OKLCH color palette with light/dark mode CSS variables, and adds reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/libs/test_data.ts: Exports static arrays of sample categories and products (with names, descriptions, prices in cents, and image URLs) for use as test/seed data in the frontend.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the LOBODA Jewelry frontend, extending the default theme with luxury color tokens (gold, charcoal, ivory), custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Montserrat), box shadows, letter spacing, and animations. Includes the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the LOBODA Jewelry project at schema version 1.0.0 / state version 5, recording architectural notes (dropshipping, pre-launch), known issues, image requirements, and a list of already-implemented features such as navigation updates, logo replacement, and category grid changes.
